items.title: Long Run
items.description: Run 10 km at a pace of 6:30 min/km. Focus on maintaining a steady effort, aiming for a heart rate in Zone 2 (about 135-145 bpm).

items.title: Tempo Run
items.description: Run 6 km with the first 2 km at an easy pace (7:00 min/km), followed by 2 km at a tempo pace of 5:30 min/km, and finish with 2 km easy (7:00 min/km). Keep your heart rate in Zone 3 (145-155 bpm) during the tempo segment.

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at a very easy pace of 7:30-8:00 min/km. Aim to keep your heart rate below 130 bpm to promote recovery.

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: After a 10-minute warm-up, perform 5x500m intervals at 5:00 min/km pace with 2 minutes of walking or slow jogging in between. Cool down for 10 minutes. Aim for a heart rate in Zone 4 (155-165 bpm) during the intervals.
